title: eval_stmt set-modifier scan: iter().take_while() over manual index loop
description: evaluator.rs eval_stmt 'set' arm (lines 156-165) uses a manual while i < rest.len() / if let Form::Tag / i += 1 loop to collect leading Tag forms into modifier_names. Idiomatic Rust: let tags: Vec<&str> = rest.iter().take_while(|f| matches\!(f, Form::Tag(_))).map(|f| { let Form::Tag(t) = f else { unreachable\!() }; t.as_str() }).collect(); then let operands = &rest[tags.len()..];. This expresses the two-phase split directly and removes the mutable index.
